title: [Brayern Isle, Jungle Path]
description: Running alongside the volcanic mountain is a dense canopy that gives way to a narrow path along the cliffside.  The mana storm above is bright, casting a slight blue haze across the landscape.  Thick vines reach down from above and encroach the path from the sides, as if they were trying to grab at passersby.  The path north leads up the mountain, and the way south heads back toward the beach.
